name: MiniMax M3
license: MiniMax Model Community License (non-commercial restrictions apply; HF license field shows 'minimax-community') — verify exact license text at https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3/blob/main/LICENSE
archDisplay: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts with MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA) for 1M-token context, native multimodal (mixed-modality pretraining from step one); 428B total / 23B active params
note: Successor to M2 introducing MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), giving a native 1M-token multimodal (text/image/video input) context window with reported 9x faster prefill / 15x faster decode vs M2 at 1M context. Open-weight release on Hugging Face alongside hosted API access. Official pricing page lists a base rate of $0.60/$2.40 per million input/output tokens with a standing 50% promotional discount to the effective $0.30/$1.20 used here for inputs ≤512K tokens; price doubles beyond 512K tokens and a 1.5x 'priority' service tier also exists (not modeled as a separate entry).
